data.title: Write RED behavioral tests for classify-sc-shape.sh
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh with 4 behavioral tests that will FAIL (RED) because classify-sc-shape.sh does not yet exist.

## Tests to Write

1. test_external_sc_returns_external_outcome: Given SC text 'the feature is deployed to production and accessible at https://app.example.com', When classify-sc-shape.sh is called with that text, Then stdout=external-outcome and exit 0
2. test_pure_code_sc_returns_pure_code: Given SC text 'all unit tests pass with 100% branch coverage', When classify-sc-shape.sh is called, Then stdout=pure-code and exit 0
3. test_third_party_sc_returns_external_outcome: Given SC text 'Stripe webhook is configured and processing live payments', When classify-sc-shape.sh is called, Then stdout=external-outcome and exit 0
4. test_internal_api_sc_returns_pure_code: Given SC text 'the API endpoint returns 200 with a correctly structured JSON response', When classify-sc-shape.sh is called, Then stdout=pure-code and exit 0

The tests call the script directly: SCRIPT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh; result=$(echo '<sc-text>' | bash "$SCRIPT"); [ "$result" = 'external-outcome' ]

Tests must be named test_external_sc_returns_external_outcome FIRST (RED marker boundary covers all subsequent tests).

Add RED marker to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh [test_external_sc_returns_external_outcome]

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: RED)
All 4 tests must fail before implementation because classify-sc-shape.sh does not exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh
- Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh
- Verify: shellcheck tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ] (RED — fails as expected)
- Verify: grep 'test_external_sc_returns_external_outcome' .test-index (RED marker present)
